description: Whimsy meets ethnic in these thong strap sandals from catwalk. The heavy beadwork is given a fresh look with the use of coloured beads. Team these with jeans and white tees or with single colour dresses.UpperThong straps with heavy beadingSoft feel lining for extra comfortLeather lined footbed with engraved gold designOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and flower heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
